messages.content: Hi, book a routine cleaning appointment next week.
Sure! May I have your name, please? And do you have a preferred day and time next week for the cleaning?
My name is Alex Rivers. I would like to come in next Tuesday morning if you have any openings.
Thank you, Alex. We have openings next Tuesday morning. What time would you prefer?
9:00 AM works perfectly for me. Do you need any other information to get me scheduled?

Thank you, Alex. I have you scheduled for a routine cleaning on Tuesday at 9:00 AM. If you have any questions about insurance or billing, please call our billing department. Otherwise, you're all set! We look forward to seeing you then.

score.reasoning: The assistant was efficient and professional but failed to collect the required contact information before finalizing the booking.
